items.original_text: In this paper, we propose a unified data creation pipeline that requires only a single formatting example, and which is applicable to a broad range of tasks, including traditionally problematic ones with semantically devoid label spaces.
items.claim_text: 提出统一数据创建流水线，仅需单个格式化示例，适用于广泛任务包括语义空洞标签空间 [EV-001]

items.original_text: In our experiments we demonstrate that instruction-following LLMs are highly cost-effective data creators, and that models trained with these data exhibit performance better than those trained with human-labeled data (by up to 17.5%) on out-of-distribution evaluation, while maintaining comparable performance on in-distribution tasks.
items.claim_text: LLM是极具成本效益的数据创造者；合成数据训练的模型在OOD评估上优于人类标注数据（最高17.5%），分布内性能相当 [EV-002]

items.original_text: Our data creation pipeline leverages an instruction-following LLM as a generator in conjunction with a single formatting example as a simple yet effective way of imposing structured constraints.
items.claim_text: 流水线使用指令跟随LLM作为生成器，结合单个格式化示例施加结构约束 [EV-003]

items.original_text: We outline 4 distinct instantiations of self-reference including random, contrastive, similar, and tree sampling for controlled diversification of data.
items.claim_text: 4种自引用策略：随机、对比、相似和树采样，实现有控多样化 [EV-004]

items.original_text: For variable option format, the expected format consists of the answer candidates Y first, followed by the correct answer y_f, and finally the question x_f. This inversion of prompt components is added to ensure that the auto-regressive model creates questions with predetermined options.
items.claim_text: 可变选项格式：答案候选在前、正确答案居中、问题最后，确保模型按预定选项生成 [EV-005]

items.original_text: Models trained on LLM data are consistently and sometimes significantly better at OOD predictive performance than their hand-crafted counterparts.
items.claim_text: LLM数据训练的模型在OOD预测上一致地优于手工数据模型 [EV-006]

items.original_text: The results demonstrate that data creation with LLMs is highly cost-effective, and costs well under $5 USD for every single dataset we created.
items.claim_text: LLM数据创建成本极低，每个数据集远低于5美元 [EV-007]

items.original_text: Tree-based exploration strategy limits the semantic distance between the seed sample and instances created later in the generation process and therefore yield higher performance on ID data.
items.claim_text: 树采样策略限制语义距离，在分布内数据上性能更高 [EV-008]

items.original_text: LLMs can play an important role when access is only available to very little data, and in specialized domains.
items.claim_text: LLM在数据稀缺的少样本场景和专门领域发挥重要作用 [EV-009]

items.original_text: While we also experimented with several recent open-source instruction-following models that distill ChatGPT responses, their abilities to generate well-formatted JSON and comprehend instructions were limited.
items.claim_text: 实验发现开源指令跟随模型生成格式良好的JSON和理解指令能力有限 [EV-010]

items.original_text: Self-referential generation iteratively samples from the pool of newly created examples to seed the prompt for the next round of generation.
items.claim_text: 自引用生成策略：从新创建示例池中迭代采样作为下一轮生成的提示 [EV-011]

items.original_text: Self-Instruct is a framework that helps language models improve their ability to follow natural language instructions by using the model's own generation of instruction data.
items.claim_text: Self-Instruct框架通过模型自身生成指令数据来提升指令跟随能力 [EV-012]
